name: HRM_PERSON_CHG_EVENTS
description: This table store the assignment change/delete event for a person, to notify plan owner on effective date.

columns.Name: PERSON_CHG_EVENT_ID
columns.Comments: Person change event id is used to uniquely identify records.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person id represents global unique id for the person.

columns.Name: OLD_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Old Assignment Id of the person.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: New/Existing Assignment Id of the the person.

columns.Name: OLD_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Old job id column represents the old job id of the person.

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: New/Existing Job ID of the person.

columns.Name: OLD_POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: Old position Id of the the person.

columns.Name: POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: New/Existing position Id of the the person.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which this change is effective.

columns.Name: PROCESSED_DATE
columns.Comments: Actual processing date and time on which the Succession Alerts are processed.

columns.Name: EVENT_NAME
columns.Comments: Event name column represent the name of hcm event.

columns.Name: EVENT_CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Event creation date and time on which the event was added to this table.

columns.Name: CHANGE_ID
columns.Comments: Id of the HCM Event created. Foreign key to HRC_EVT_OBJ_CHANGES.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Processing status of the succession notifications.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Processing error or comments of this operation.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
